rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the target component scope in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reside in valid AADL scopes: type annexes for assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings.
Avoid referencing subcomponent ports or implementation-only paths in component type contracts.
Ensure AGREE type names match AADL scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax for AGREE blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not reference package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
